description: Consolidated usage, activity and ROI metrics for enterprise admins. Phase 1 scope only (see PRD v2.3)
Personalised notification system using ML to reduce notification fatigue. A/B test in progress.
Full redesign of iOS and Android apps. Focus: offline mode and speed.
New GraphQL API alongside existing REST. Developer experience priority.
Improved multi-document summarisation. Reduces hallucination rate to <2%.
Dedicated team workspaces with shared templates, pinned docs, and team-level analytics.
Streamlined integration setup. Target: 50% reduction in setup time for new integrations.
Progressive web app offline capability for core editing functions.
Boolean search operators, date filters, file-type filters across entire workspace.
User-defined export templates for PDF and Word. Requested by 340 enterprise customers.
